repository.name: Masters of PixInsight V8 Scripts
repository.description: V8-compatible PixInsight scripts ported and maintained by Peter Proulx, Masters of PixInsight (www.mastersofpixinsight.com). Includes ports of popular community scripts updated for PixInsight 1.9.4 Lockhart and the V8 JavaScript engine, including full Apple Silicon (ARM64) support.
